owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP.md next worker-ready slice after v0-sprint-027

chunks.title: Promote degraded MP handoff continuity into follow-up guidance
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Multiplayer Generated Overlay Distribution / real-session validation loop
chunks.goal: Ensure degraded `handoff_status`, `previous_host_available=false`, or handoff continuity drift can directly influence compare/trend recommendation or `next_action` guidance instead of remaining passive telemetry.
acceptance: At least one explicit compare/trend or loop-level guidance field reacts to degraded MP handoff continuity with a stable reason.
Owner-facing next-step text or one-file evidence highlights manual-save-recovery or host-rotation follow-up without requiring custom downstream interpretation.
tools/run_v0_pipeline_tests.ps1 fails closed if the new guidance contract disappears.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after MP handoff guidance slice
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and owner-facing daily summary aligned after the MP handoff guidance contract lands.
acceptance: Roadmap next-worker-ready notes mention the shipped MP handoff guidance contract once tests pass.
The sprint queue is refreshed to the next bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving stale completed chunks.
The daily freework report is replaced without creating report spam.
